causal_graph.title: Module (i): Causal Graph Construction
causal_graph.description: Constructs a dynamic Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) encodes mechanistic links between source credibility, linguistic features, and spread dynamics.
causal_graph.algorithm: NOTEARS (Non-combinatorial Optimisation via Trace Exponential and Augmented Lagrangian)

bert_fusion.title: Module (ii): Deep Learning Classification
bert_fusion.description: Fine-tuned BERT-base-uncased transformer model augmented with graph-derived causal embeddings.
bert_fusion.improvement: +4.8% F1-score over baseline purely linguistic classifiers

counterfactual.title: Module (iii): Counterfactual Intervention Engine
counterfactual.description: Generated human-readable explanations via do-calculus simulation on the inferred Structural Causal Model (SCM).
